title: Warm Crispy Italian Rice Suppli
description: A fermented, fluffy Italian dish from Emilia-Romagna, featuring chervil and lardons, served in a talavera plate, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the fermented Arborio rice, crumbled lardons, chopped chervil, and grated Grana Padano cheese.
In a separate bowl, beat the egg and mix it with the rice mixture until well combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small suppli forms.
Dip each suppli into the beaten egg and then roll it in the breadcrumbs to coat.
Place the coated suppli on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the suppli and sprinkle with salt to taste.
Bake the suppli in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the warm crispy Italian rice suppli in a talavera plate and enjoy.
